creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #10)

FYI: My context was explicitly trying to build
lumina and xscreensaver.

xscreensaver and what it depends on
built for all 3 architectures tried:

arm.armv6 (with -mcpu=cortex-a7 )
arm64.aarch64 (with -mcpu=cortex-a53 )
amd64.amd64 (no -mcpu )

lumina and what it depends on built for
2 architectures of the 3:

arm64.aarch64 (with -mcpu=cortex-a53 )
amd64.amd64 (no -mcpu )

but was prevented from finishing by
qt5-gui failing for:

arm.armv6 (with -mcpu=cortex-a7 )

It left about 11 other ports in the
"skipped" status.
